runs.command:
llama-server -m unsloth/gemma-3-4b-it-GGUF/gemma-3-4b-it-Q4_K_M.gguf --mmproj unsloth/gemma-3-4b-it-GGUF/mmproj-F16.gguf -ngl 999 -t 8 -fa 1 -c 4096 --port 18080 --host 127.0.0.1 --no-cache-prompt & sleep 5 # wait for /v1/models to come up IMG_B64=$(base64 -w0 <model-path> curl -N http://127.0.0.1:18080/v1/chat/completions 
 -H Content-Type: application/json 
 -d {"model":"any","stream":true,"max_tokens":128,"temperature":0,
"messages":[{"role":"user","content":[{"type":"text","text":
"Describe this image in detail."},
{"type":"image_url","image_url":{"url":"data:image/jpeg;base64,$IMG_B64"}}]}]} kill %1
